name: Foaster
long_description:
Foaster is an AI-native partner for AI transformation. 

We help companies become AI-native by building a deep understanding of how they actually operate, then using that understanding to decide where AI should be deployed, what should change, and how to make the transformation stick.

Our AI agents conduct private 45-minute interviews across the organization, in parallel, to capture how work really happens: workflows, tools, handoffs, bottlenecks, dependencies, and what people think should change. 

From those interviews, we build a living operational map of the company and use it to produce transformation blueprints grounded in real operational data. 

This is work that, done manually, would have required very large teams working full-time. AI is what allows us to do it with far greater speed, depth, and consistency.

And we do not stop at a one-off plan. Every month, our system updates its understanding of the business, tracks adoption, refreshes the operational map, surfaces new opportunities, and delivers personalized AI upskilling to employees based on their exact role and context. 

Our human experts focus where humans matter most: validating recommendations, building trust, and helping companies execute over time. For enterprise deployments, our forward-deployed engineers help embed AI directly into workflows and systems.
one_liner: Your AI-native partner for AI transformation.
